description_long: This is a heavy-duty hammer with a robust, rectangular head featuring prominent green stripes and metallic panels, suggesting a reinforced or possibly powered design. The head is large and boxy, with visible bolts and a dark, industrial finish, while the handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a textured grip, and includes metallic and rubberized segments for enhanced control. The hammer's neck area has mechanical details, such as exposed wiring and a reinforced joint, indicating it may be designed for high-impact or specialized tasks. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and composite materials, with a focus on durability and strength. The color scheme is primarily dark with green highlights, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance. No visible branding or significant wear is present, and the hammer appears to be in excellent condition.
description: A large, industrial hammer with a boxy, green-striped head and a textured, reinforced handle. The design is modern, durable, and appears suited for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the green-striped, boxy head and the detailed, textured handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat striking face of the hammer head and the alignment of the bolts on its surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the head and handle, with visible mechanical details near the neck.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the back of the hammer head, with visible wiring and grip details.
attribute_handle_type: Textured, cylindrical handle with rubberized grip sections and metallic reinforcement, designed for ergonomic handling and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, sledge-type hammer head with flat striking faces and prominent green accent stripes, reinforced with visible bolts and mechanical details.
